original_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
gt_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

query_1.question: What trials have Cancer type equal to Melanoma?
query_1.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

query_2.question: What trials have Name of ICI equal to Ipilimumab?
query_2.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';

query_3.question: What trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall greater than 21?
query_3.sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
